summary: Experienced technology leader with 18+ years of software engineering and organizational leadership expertise. Proven track record scaling engineering organizations, implementing architectural solutions, and driving business growth through full-stack engineering capabilities and people leadership.

experience.title: VP Enterprise Systems
highlights: Scaled engineering organization from 20 to 120+ members across international locations within 18 months
Spearheaded mentoring programs for engineering managers and senior staff, improving retention rates by 30%
Restructured the department, implementing Agile processes that improved project delivery speed by 25%

experience.title: Director of Customer Solutions
highlights: Increased client retention by 32% by implementing proactive account management systems and tailored customer success strategies
Drove a 24% increase in sales by developing a customer-focused consulting strategy
Transformed reactive customer support into a proactive advisory model, reducing service complaints by 25%
Spearheaded the development of new service offerings, generating new revenue within the first year

experience.title: Senior Software Engineer
highlights: Led a team of 7 in designing a scalable microservices architecture, accelerating data processing by 37%
Migrated 10+ legacy on-premise applications to AWS, reducing infrastructure costs by 30%
Delivered a client-facing web portal using React and Python 2 months ahead of schedule, resulting in a 15% increase in user retention
Developed a HIPAA-compliant migration script to upgrade client systems, successfully transitioning 50+ data nodes with zero downtime
